Operation 'subscribeToZapier' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too brief and lacks critical details. Enhanced version clarifies what the subscription enables (webhook event delivery), what the user will receive (meeting summaries and action items), authentication requirements, return value, and the side effect of establishing the integration. This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose and consequences.

data.current_description: Subscribe to Zapier webhook via OAuth Bearer token
data.description_suggestion: Subscribes the authenticated user to Zapier webhook notifications. Requires OAuth Bearer token authentication. Upon successful subscription, the user will receive webhook events for meeting summaries and action items. Returns subscription confirmation with webhook endpoint details. This operation establishes the integration between Lua Legal and Zapier.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks critical details. Enhanced version clarifies what the subscription enables (webhook event delivery), what the user will receive (meeting summaries and action items), authentication requirements, return value, and the side effect of establishing the integration. This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose and consequences.

message: Operation 'unsubscribeFromZapier' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. data.current_description: Unsubscribe from Zapier webhook via OAuth Bearer token
data.description_suggestion: Unsubscribes the authenticated user from Zapier webhook notifications. Requires OAuth Bearer token authentication. Upon successful unsubscription, the user will no longer receive webhook events for meeting summaries and action items. Returns unsubscription confirmation. This operation terminates the active integration between Lua Legal and Zapier.

message: Operation 'testZapierTrigger' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, not_actionable. Original summary and description are vague about the operation's purpose and outcome. Enhanced summary clarifies the action (sending test data). data.current_description: Test endpoint to trigger all user integrations with test data
data.summary_suggestion: Send test data to all user integrations
data.description_suggestion: Sends test data to all active Zapier integrations for the authenticated user. This endpoint is used to validate that Zapier triggers are properly configured and receiving data. Returns test payload data that was sent to each integration. Useful for debugging integration issues or verifying trigger setup before production use.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are vague about the operation's purpose and outcome. Enhanced summary clarifies the action (sending test data). message: Operation 'performZapierTrigger' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, unclear_purpose, missing_context, not_actionable. Original description is unclear about what data is being returned and the operation's purpose in the Zapier workflow. Enhanced version clarifies that this retrieves meeting data (summaries and action items), explains the return format (array structure), and provides context about how Zapier uses this endpoint (for trigger-based automations). This helps AI agents understand the operation's role in the integration workflow.

data.current_description: Return the exact payload structure as an array for Zapier integration
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve meeting data for Zapier trigger
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current meeting summaries and action items for the authenticated user in the exact payload structure required by Zapier. Returns an array of meeting records with summaries and associated action items. This endpoint is called by Zapier to fetch data for trigger-based automations. Used in workflows where Lua Legal meeting data triggers downstream actions in other applications.
data.reasoning: Original description is unclear about what data is being returned and the operation's purpose in the Zapier workflow. This helps AI agents understand the operation's role in the integration workflow.
